name: my-lingo
description: A personal Claude Code language-learning and prompt-enhancement plugin. Optimizes your prompts to English and builds personalized language learning materials from your real coding interactions.

api_base_url.title: API Base URL
api_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL (e.g., https://api.openai.com/v1). Enter it here, or leave blank to use the MY_LINGO_API_BASE_URL env var. This field takes precedence over the env var.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key for the external optimization model. Enter it here (stored securely), or leave blank to use the MY_LINGO_API_KEY env var. This field takes precedence over the env var.

model_fast.title: Fast Model
model_fast.description: Model for synchronous prompt optimization (e.g., gpt-4o-mini, deepseek-chat). Enter it here, or leave blank to use the MY_LINGO_MODEL_FAST env var. This field takes precedence over the env var.

model_deep.title: Deep Model
model_deep.description: Model for lesson and profile generation (e.g., gpt-4o). Enter it here, or use the MY_LINGO_MODEL_DEEP env var. Defaults to the Fast Model if not set.

native_language.title: Native Language
native_language.description: Your native language code for explanations (e.g., zh-CN, ja, ko).

timeout_seconds.title: API Timeout (seconds)
timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time to wait for API response before falling back.
